pr.title: Record: 8192 Vocab, Sliding Window Eval, Selective Quantization; 1.194 val_bpb

output.summary: 8-layer model uses SP-8192 tokenizer, NorMuon, stride-256 sliding window eval, and selective w6e8 quantization for compact, accurate scoring.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Val data is used only for evaluation as part of the standard track; training is on the regular regime.
techniques: stride-256 sliding-window validation for tighter bpb
selective w6e8 quantization (INT6 weights, INT8 embeddings)
